texto: His introduction throws me. The only time I can envision "Hi, I'm a surgeon" as a fitting introduction is if I were on a gurney in a stark white room and a man wielding a scalpel was standing over me. Plus, it's been a while since we've talked careers with anyone. Jobs are rarely a topic of conversation anymore--they exist in a place and time too far away to seem interesting. "What do you do?" is not a question asked to define someone, because out here we're all working the same jobs: yachties, mechanics, navigators, weather-readers, fishermen, adventure travelers, storytellers.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Torre DeRoche que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “His introduction throws me. The only time I can envision "Hi, I'm a surgeon" as a fitting introdu…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, jobs, sailing, com foco em viagem e trabalho.
